codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All changes were successfully pushed to GitHub (https://github.com/osazain/acs2909-web-programming). GitHub Actions deployment was triggered. The feature fulfilled VAL-CROSS-002 as shown in validation-state.json.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Git remote URL uses https://github.com/osazain/acs2909-web-programming.git - the 'a' in osazain appears to be missing in some documentation (some references use 'oszain').

summary: Feature implementation is complete. git push succeeded to osazain/acs2909-web-programming. GitHub Actions workflow triggered. VAL-CROSS-002 validation assertion shows status 'passed' validated at milestone 'deploy' by 'push-to-github'.
